{{Infobox starship
| name = Advocate ship
| introduced = The Engineer
}}

== The Engineer ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|An individual [[Iron Legion]] ship might not match an [[Advocate ship]] of the same class.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c33">''The Engineer'', chapter 33</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Advocate]] ships have shields that can be overloaded.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c38">''The Engineer'', chapter 38</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The narrator is amidst the wreckage of a destroyed [[Advocate ship]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c38" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Starships]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
